narrative:
Beavercreek 027 (precinct in Greene County) has 485 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.3 percentage points.
